title: Fizz Buzz
description:
Given an integer `n`, return an array `answer` (1-indexed) where:

- answer[i] = "FizzBuzz" if i is divisible by 3 and 5
- answer[i] = "Fizz" if i is divisible by 3
- answer[i] = "Buzz" if i is divisible by 5
- answer[i] = i (as a string) otherwise
hints: Check divisibility by 15 FIRST — otherwise you'll catch threes before fizzbuzzes.
Push the result as a string. Even the numbers.
